name: Jab We Matched
overview: Jab We Matched is a collection of 4 new age dating love stories with an unexpected twist at the end. This title has everything - from nerds devising a code for finding dates for them to a pair who met on a date and decided to make their exes jealous under their "Ex-Wapisi" scheme.

trailers.title: JAB WE MATCHED - Official Trailer | Jasmin Bhasin | Shivangi Joshi  | Amazon miniTV
